docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 REMARKS: ADDRESS GIVEN FROM THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT EXIST. THERE IS A 3262 ADDRESS AND DIRECTLY NEXT DOOR IS 3258 25TH STREET. 3260 EITHER DOESN'T EXIST OR IS NOT PROPERLY LABELLED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, VICTOR MANUEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-09-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL CAMPOS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANCE MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONIC ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVCE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, VICTOR MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
